name: dh-annual-report-2023-24-procurement-including-ict-and-advertising
title: DH Annual Report 2023-24 Procurement (including ICT and advertising)
notes:
This is a machine-readable version of the procurement dataset from the Department of Health 2023-24 Annual Report.

It contains the following tables:

* Consultancy expenditure - Details of consultancies (valued at $10,000 or greater)
* Reviews and studies expenditure
* Emergency procurement
* Information and communication technology expenditure
* Government advertising expenditure

---

For additional information and context for these tables, please read from page 84 in the Annual Report. https://www.health.vic.gov.au/department-of-health-annual-report

resources.name: Procurement including ICT and advertising- 2023-24 machine-readable dataset
